scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agent-memory/core && npm run build --workspace agent-memory && npm run build --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @agent-memory/core && npm run test --workspace agent-memory && npm run test --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @agent-memory/core && npm run lint --workspace agent-memory && npm run lint --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @agent-memory/core && npm run format --workspace agent-memory && npm run format --workspace @agent-memory/nextjs --if-present
scripts.prepush: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
